content:
Hey-o! I found some bugs when migrating more code to the new Roc compiler:

Blocking migrating https://github.com/niclas-ahden/joy:
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/9932
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/9953

Non-blocking (found when migrating https://github.com/niclas-ahden/roc-crc32):
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/9930

I PRd tests :ok:

Hi @Niclas Ahden,
I expect we'll be able to take care of the blocking issues in a couple of days at most.
